title: oryctanthus costulatus
intro: Oryctanthus costulatus, also known as the "Thorny Cactus", is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. The plant is said to have medicinal properties due to its unique bioactive compounds, which are known to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oryctanthus costulatus include its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and alleviate fever, as well as its potential use in treating various digestive issues. Traditional herbal preparations of Oryctanthus costulatus include infusions, decoctions, and topical ointments, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
